title: mentha bianoris
intro: Mentha bianoris, also known as Bergamot Mint, is a perennial herb belonging to the mint family (Lamiaceae) and is native to the Mediterranean region. This plant possesses medicinal properties due to its high concentration of essential oils, which include menthone, limonene, and linalool. The health benefits of Mentha bianoris include its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can aid in relieving digestive issues and reducing stress. Traditionally, the plant is used to make herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and topical creams, often in combination with other herbs like peppermint and lemon balm.
